message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

box "Client"
participant client
participant tcpclient
end box

box "Server"
participant tcpserver
participant server
end box

server -> tcpserver : listen
hnote over tcpserver #cyan : LISTEN

client -> tcpclient : connect
tcpclient -> tcpserver : SYN
hnote over tcpclient #green : SYN-SENT
hnote over tcpserver #blue : SYN-RECEIVED
tcpserver -> tcpclient : SYN, ACK
tcpclient -> tcpserver : ACK
hnote over tcpclient #lightgreen : ESTABLISHED
hnote over tcpserver #lightgreen : ESTABLISHED

tcpserver -> server : EPOLLIN
server -> tcpserver : write
tcpclient -> tcpserver : PSH, ACK
tcpclient -> tcpserver : ACK

tcpclient -> client : EPOLLIN
client -> tcpclient : read

server -> tcpserver : close
hnote over tcpserver #mediumpurple : FIN_WAIT1

tcpserver -> tcpclient : FIN, ACK
hnote over tcpclient #magenta : CLOSE_WAIT

tcpclient -> tcpserver : ACK
hnote over tcpserver #orange : FIN_WAIT2

tcpclient -> client : EPOLLRDHUP
client -> tcpclient : close
hnote over tcpclient #magenta : LAST_ACK

tcpclient -> tcpserver : FIN
tcpserver -> tcpclient : ACK
hnote over tcpclient #red : CLOSE

hnote over tcpserver #yellow : TIMEWAIT
note right of tcpserver : timer 60s
hnote over tcpserver #yellow : CLOSE

@enduml
```
